name: VesPro LiveBerries
description: LiveBerries is a delicious berry fruit beverage formulated using 9 different types of whole berries. It is an excellent source of polyphenols and whole food antioxidants standardized ORAC 8000 TE per serving (Brunswick Labs USA certified).
benefits: Antioxidant rich - ORAC 8000 TE per serving
Fights harmful free radicals from daily computer and smartphone usage
Reduces inflammation in the body (lowers CRP marker)
Boosts recovery for chemotherapy patients and athletes
May help maintain good health and slow down aging

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet daily mixed in 125ml water or juice (below 40°C)
dosage.general: Mix 1 sachet into 125ml of water or juice (below 40°C)

who_can_consume: People using computers/smartphones daily, office workers, athletes, chemotherapy recovery patients, shift workers, general public.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have specific health conditions.

qa.question: What makes LiveBerries special?
qa.answer: Each serving provides 1.5 cups of fresh berries with ORAC 8000 TE per serving (Brunswick Labs certified). The berries are from small, old-fashioned American family farms using ethical farming and heirloom seeds (not GMO or hybrid). Cold spray processed (not freeze dried) for optimal quality.

qa.question: Is LiveBerries Halal certified?
qa.answer: Yes, LiveBerries is certified Halal by JAKIM and is a product of USA. It contains no artificial flavoring, coloring or sweeteners and is a vegetarian formula.
